textByHashes.94c53f281a601dae41e5d26f118ee50eba4753b2: Welcome to the Miscellania food store. We've only opened recently.
textByHashes.797d6c1f42f495c656a326293454d0c04671e69f: Would you like to buy anything, your Royal Highness?
textByHashes.debcbf65526d182ad09bf253340723892778dbd3: The town's growing larger, and business is doing well.
textByHashes.eeb3736de8980f72173a75f7c6d834a7705a14dd: I'm worried about the stories I've heard about monsters, though.
textByHashes.b955c0062bf36f001418cd3b30581708bd636ed0: I heard that one of the dwarves saw monsters in the other caves!
textByHashes.3c3f43a87c3e4f616ecca249632b5367691b0108: I don't know more than that, so you'd have to ask the dwarves.
textByHashes.e87f73c3a5695a00dddbbfb65519abb25c2beb91: The town's thriving. I'm sure it'll soon be as busy as Rellekka!
